seoTitle: Swan Bay vs Swan Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swan Bay and Swan Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Swan Bay vs Swan Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swan Bay and Swan Vale.
heading: Swan Bay vs Swan Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swan Bay, New South Wales and Swan Vale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swan Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Swan Vale (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swan Bay or Swan Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swan Bay has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Swan Vale scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swan Bay scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Swan Vale scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swan Bay or Swan Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swan Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
